# EBC Engagement Template

Use this template for **EBC** (Executive Briefing Center) engagement documents. Replace all `{placeholder}` values with actual data from the specialist agents.

---

```markdown
# {Customer Name} — EBC Engagement

**Date:** {YYYY-MM-DD}
**Type:** Executive Briefing Center (EBC)
**Prepared by:** {PM Name}
**Prior Engagement:** [{prior-date}-{prior-type}.md]({prior-date}-{prior-type}.md)

---

## Prior Context

**Last engagement:** {prior-date} ({prior-type})
**Key outcome:** {one-line summary of last engagement}

### Carried-Forward Open Items

- [ ] {Open item 1} (carried from {prior-date}-{prior-type})
- [ ] {Open item 2} (carried from {prior-date}-{prior-type})

---

## Field Context

**Why this EBC was requested:** {reason — field ask, customer request, strategic account review}
**Field objectives:** {what the field team wants to accomplish}
**Microsoft attendees:** {who from Microsoft will be present}

---

## Stakeholder Profiles

| Name | Title | Decision Authority | Relationship History | Notes |
|------|-------|--------------------|---------------------|-------|
| {name} | {title} | {Budget/Technical/Exec Sponsor} | {Met at X, discussed Y} | {preferences, concerns} |

---

## Account Health — Full Customer 360

### Key Metrics

| Metric | Current | MoM% | YoY% | Trend |
|--------|---------|------|------|-------|
| Fabric MAU | {val} | {mom}% | {yoy}% | {↑/↓/→} |
| CU Hours (28d) | {val} | {mom}% | {yoy}% | {↑/↓/→} |
| ARR (MTD) | ${val} | {mom}% | {yoy}% | {↑/↓/→} |
| NPS | {val} | — | — | — |
| Active Service Requests | {val} | — | — | — |

### Workload Breakdown

| Workload | MAU | CU Hours | Trend |
|----------|-----|----------|-------|
| {workload 1} | {val} | {val} | {↑/↓/→} |
| {workload 2} | {val} | {val} | {↑/↓/→} |

---

## PBI CAT Feedback

### Issue Reports

| # | Title | Severity | Status | Product Area | Created |
|---|-------|----------|--------|-------------|---------|
| 1 | {title} | {sev} | {status} | {area} | {date} |

### Escalation History

| Date | Issue | Resolution | Status |
|------|-------|-----------|--------|
| {date} | {issue summary} | {resolution or pending} | {resolved/open} |

### Enterprise Voice Interviews

{Summary of any Enterprise Voice interview records for this customer}

---

## Competitive Landscape

| Competitor | Products Used | Positioning | Risk Level |
|-----------|--------------|-------------|------------|
| {competitor} | {products} | {why they're attractive to customer} | {High/Medium/Low} |

**Positioning notes:** {how to position Microsoft/Fabric against competitors in this engagement}

---

## Talking Points

### Key Messages
1. {Message 1 — what to emphasize}
2. {Message 2 — what to emphasize}
3. {Message 3 — what to emphasize}

### Things to Say
- {Talking point that positions us well}
- {Data point that shows value}

### Landmines to Avoid
- {Topic that could derail the conversation}
- {Known pain point — acknowledge but redirect}

---

## Prep Documents

| Document | Location | Purpose |
|----------|----------|---------|
| {doc name} | {link or path} | {why it's relevant} |

---

## Open Questions

- {Question to ask the customer}
- {Question to research before the meeting}

---

## Meeting Notes

{Filled in during or after the meeting}

---

## Action Items

- [ ] {Action item 1} — {Owner} — {Due date}
- [ ] {Action item 2} — {Owner} — {Due date}
```
